body.title: Add 'what could we do better?' reflection step to expert audit
body.result: Added Step 20 — improvement reflection to day-close-audit; updated findings report format with Improvements: line; updated audit-day step count reference
body.description:
The expert audit checklist should explicitly ask auditors to identify improvement opportunities, not just surface defects. Adding a 'what could we do better?' reflection step will surface gaps in process, infrastructure, and architecture that the mechanical checks miss.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/day-close-audit skill (or wherever the expert audit checklist lives)

**Design rules:** none apply

**Scope boundary:** Add the reflection step as step 20 (or first, if reflections should precede findings). The question should ask: what patterns emerged? What's the biggest friction point? What one change would unblock the next batch? In scope: one clear prompt. Out of scope: implementing the improvements (those become separate tickets).

**Test plan:** Run the full audit once with the new step enabled; verify the reflection produces 1-3 actionable improvement ideas that could reasonably become future tickets.
